creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Thu Nov 28 17:52:42 2013
New Revision: 335115
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335115

Log:
  - Use QMAKE_PRO instead of do-configure
  
  PR:		ports/184333
  Suggested by:	madpilot

Modified:
  head/lang/basic256/Makefile

Modified: head/lang/basic256/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/basic256/Makefile	Thu Nov 28 17:50:36 2013	(r335114)
+++ head/lang/basic256/Makefile	Thu Nov 28 17:52:42 2013	(r335115)
@@ -21,13 +21,10 @@ WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}
 USES=		bison dos2unix qmake
 USE_SDL=	sdl mixer
 USE_QT4=	corelib gui network xml webkit moc_build rcc_build uic_build
+QMAKE_PRO=	BASIC256.pro
 
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
-do-configure:
-	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${CONFIGURE_ENV} \
-		${QMAKE} "PREFIX=${PREFIX}" BASIC256.pro
-
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/mutex/mymutex/' ${WRKSRC}/*.cpp
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%LOCALBASE%%|${LOCALBASE}|' ${WRKSRC}/BASIC256.pro
